components.name: Button
components.keyInsightSeed: Brand-violet primary, whisper-quiet hover, 36px default height for dense dashboards

components.name: Card
components.keyInsightSeed: Layered background tints over heavy shadows; clickable cards lift subtly on hover

components.name: Input
components.keyInsightSeed: Sunken inset background, violet focus ring, 36px height matching buttons

components.name: Table
components.keyInsightSeed: Row-hover tint instead of borders; status badges inline for node states

components.name: Navigation
components.keyInsightSeed: Sidebar tree with violet-tint active state; 32px row height for system/module hierarchy

components.name: Modal
components.keyInsightSeed: 48% black overlay with 2px blur; centered panel with soft shadow; used for node editor and confirmations
